ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "position" TEXT /* Employee's job position */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office where the employee is located */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Employee's age */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Employee's start date at the company */,
  "salary" REAL /* Employee's annual salary */,
  "extension" INTEGER /* Employee's office extension number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Employee's job title */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Employee's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the office */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used at the office */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the office is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the office is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the position belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job position */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed job description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's position */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office where the employee worked */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the position or transfer */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the position or transfer */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the position change or transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_history_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_history_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given during the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and feedback from the review */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training (completed, ongoing, etc.) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary change */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the salary change */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary amount */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of salary change (promotion, cost of living adjustment, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_changes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off" (
  "time_off_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time off record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time off */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time off */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of time off (e.g., vacation, sick leave) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the time off (approved, pending, etc.) */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days taken off */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_off_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee benefit association */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benefit */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee enrolled in the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the benefit becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_benefit_id FOREIGN KEY ("benefit_id") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_clearances" (
  "clearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security clearance */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the security clearance */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the clearance was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the clearance expires */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the clearance was last renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_clearances_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_contacts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "university" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
